name: Steak Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the julienned beef, cubed potatoes, and chopped onions.
2. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Drizzle with caper vinaigrette dressing.
4. Tear the lettuce leaves into smaller pieces and add them to the bowl.
5. Mix all ingredients gently until well combined.
6. Serve immediately.
